303164 <!DOCTYPE html>
303180 <html lang="zh-CN"><head>
303206 <meta charset="UTF-8">
303229 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
303297 <title>
303316 </title>
303325 <style>
303333 body{font-family:-apple-system,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;background:#f5f3ee;color:#1d1d1f;margin:0;padding:18px;max-width:520px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}
303498 h1{font-size:24px;margin:4px 0 6px}
303534 h2{font-size:15px;margin:0 0 10px}
303569 .sub{color:#6e6e73;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45;margin:0 0 14px}
303637 .card{background:#fff;padding:16px;border-radius:18px;margin:12px 0;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.07)}
303744 .state{display:inline-block;background:#ece7dc;color:#5d4b2f;font-size:13px;border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;margin:2px 0 12px}
303876 .pick{display:block;border:1px dashed #c7c0b4;border-radius:14px;padding:18px 14px;text-align:center;background:#fbfaf7;color:#5d4b2f;font-size:15px;margin:10px 0;cursor:pointer}
304055 input[type=file]{display:none}
304086 .preview{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#eee9df;border-radius:16px;min-height:220px;margin:12px 0;overflow:hidden;color:#8a8173;font-size:14px}
304265 .preview img{width:200px;height:200px;image-rendering:pixelated;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.16);background:#fff}
304384 .actions{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
304431 .btn{flex:1;min-width:150px;background:#111;color:#fff;padding:13px;text-align:center;border:0;border-radius:12px;font-size:16px;cursor:pointer}
304576 .btn:disabled{background:#d1d1d6;color:#8e8e93;cursor:not-allowed}
304643 .btn-light{background:#ebe7df;color:#4b4035}
304688 .btn-del{background:#fff;color:#d70015;border:1px solid #f0d3d5}
304753 .field{margin:12px 0}.field label{display:block;font-size:13px;color:#6e6e73;margin-bottom:6px}
304849 select{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;border:1px solid #e3ded5;border-radius:12px;background:#fbfaf7;color:#1d1d1f;font-size:15px;padding:12px}
304995 #s{min-height:22px;padding:6px 0;font-size:14px;color:#6e6e73}
305058 #s.ok{color:#248a3d}
305079 #s.err{color:#d70015}
305101 </style>
305110 </head>
305118 <body>
305141 </h1>
305147 <p class="sub">
305242 <div class="card" id="info">
305271 <div class="state">
305299 <b id="st">
305322 </b></div>
305333 <h2>1. 
305352 </h2>
305358 <label class="pick" for="f"><span id="fn">
305412  PNG / JPG 
305429 </span></label>
305445 <input type="file" id="f" accept="image/*" onchange="choose()">
305509 <div class="field">
305529 <label for="dk">
305557 </label>
305566 <select id="dk" onchange="kernelChanged()">
305610 <option value="FLOYD_STEINBERG">
305654 </option>
305664 <option value="THRESHOLD">
305699 </option>
305709 <option value="ATKINSON">
305746 </option>
305756 <option value="SIERRA2">
305792 </option>
305802 <option value="BURKES">
305837 </option>
305847 <option value="STUCKI">
305885 </option>
305895 <option value="JARVIS_JUDICE_NINKE">
305943 </option>
305953 <option value="DIFFUSION_ROW">
305995 </option>
306005 <option value="DIFFUSION_COLUMN">
306050 </option>
306060 <option value="DIFFUSION_2D">
306101 </option>
306111 </select>
306121 </div>
306128 <h2>2. 
306147 </h2>
306153 <div class="preview" id="pv"><span>
306212 </span></div>
306226 <div id="s"></div>
306245 <div class="actions">
306267 <button type="button" class="btn btn-light" id="previewBtn" onclick="preview()" disabled>
306368 </button>
306378 <button type="button" class="btn" id="saveBtn" onclick="save()" disabled>
306466 </button>
306476 </div>
306483 <div class="actions" style="margin-top:10px">
306529 <button class="btn btn-del" onclick="rst()">
306591 </button>
306601 </div>
306608 </div>
306615 <script>
306624 var $=function(i){return document.getElementById(i)};
306678 function dbg(m){void m}
306702 function log(m,c){var s=$('s');s.textContent=m;s.className=c||'';dbg(m)}
306775 var CONVERT_API='https://dot.mindreset.tech/api/authV2/device/render/convert';
306854 var DEVICE_SERIES='rand';
306880 var DEVICE_MODEL='rand_0';
306907 var DEVICE_EDITION=Number('1');
306939 var chosenFile=null,pendingData='',maxUpload=0;
306987 var MAX_LOCAL_BYTES=5*1024*1024;
307020 function setBusy(b){$('previewBtn').disabled=b||!chosenFile;$('saveBtn').disabled=b||!pendingData}
307119 function showPreview(src){$('pv').innerHTML=src?'<img alt="
307190 " src="'+src+'">':'<span>
307239 </span>'}
307249 function clearChosen(){
307273   chosenFile=null;pendingData='';
307307   try{$('f').value='';}catch(_){}
307341   $('fn').textContent='
307376  PNG / JPG 
307396   showPreview('');setBusy(false);
307432 function choose(){
307451   chosenFile=$('f').files[0]||null;pendingData='';showPreview('');setBusy(false);
307533   if(!chosenFile){$('fn').textContent='
307584  PNG / JPG 
307601 ';return}
307611   if(chosenFile.size>MAX_LOCAL_BYTES){
307650     var mb=(chosenFile.size/1024/1024).toFixed(1);
307701     log('
307722  '+mb+'MB
307746  5 MB
307781 ','err');
307791     clearChosen();return;
307821   $('fn').textContent=chosenFile.name;
307860   log('
307927 function kernelChanged(){
307953   pendingData='';showPreview('');setBusy(false);
308002   if(chosenFile){log('
308075 function readAsDataUrl(file){
308105   dbg('
308124 : '+file.name+', '+file.size+' bytes');
308164   return new Promise(function(resolve,reject){
308211     var r=new FileReader();
308239     r.onload=function(){resolve(String(r.result||''))};
308295     r.onerror=function(){reject(new Error('
308356 '))};
308362     r.readAsDataURL(file);
308389   });
308397 function fetchWithTimeout(url,opt,timeoutMs){
308443   var ctl=new AbortController();
308476   var t=setTimeout(function(){ctl.abort()},timeoutMs||20000);
308538   var o=Object.assign({},opt||{});o.signal=ctl.signal;
308593   return fetch(url,o).finally(function(){clearTimeout(t)});
308655 function convertViaApi(dataUrl){
308688   var body={
308701     series:DEVICE_SERIES,
308727     model:DEVICE_MODEL,
308751     edition:DEVICE_EDITION,
308779     image:dataUrl,
308798     colorLevels:4,
308817     ditherType:'DIFFUSION',
308845     ditherKernel:$('dk').value
308881   dbg('
308916   return fetchWithTimeout(CONVERT_API,{
308956     method:'POST',
308975     headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
309024     body:JSON.stringify(body)
309054   },25000).then(function(r){
309083     return r.json().catch(function(){return {}}).then(function(j){
309150       if(!r.ok){
309167         if(r.status===413){throw new Error('
309241  5 MB');}
309251         throw new Error((j&&j.message)?j.message:('
309314  '+r.status));
309329       }
309337       var data=(j&&j.COMPRESS_ARRAY_V2)?String(j.COMPRESS_ARRAY_V2):'';
309409       var img=(j&&j.COMPRESS_RENDER)?String(j.COMPRESS_RENDER):'';
309476       if(!data){throw new Error('
309532       dbg('
309555 : data='+data.length+' bytes, preview='+(img?img.length:0)+' bytes');
309625       return {data:data,preview:img};
309663     });
309671   }).catch(function(e){
309695     if(e&&e.name==='AbortError'){
309729       throw new Error('
309792     }
309798     if(e&&String(e).indexOf('Failed to fetch')>=0){
309850       throw new Error('
309938     }
309944     throw e;
309957   });
309965 function uploadConverted(text){
309997   dbg('
310025 : '+text.length+' bytes');
310052   if(maxUpload&&text.length>maxUpload){return Promise.reject(new Error('
310186   return fetchWithTimeout('/wallpaper',{
310227     method:'POST',
310246     body:text,
310261     headers:{'Content-Type':'application/octet-stream'}
310317   },20000).then(function(r){
310346     dbg('
310373 : HTTP '+r.status);
310393     if(r.ok){return 'ok';}
310420     return r.text().then(function(){throw new Error(r.status===413?'
310572 ');});
310579   }).catch(function(e){
310603     if(e&&e.name==='AbortError') throw new Error('
310681     throw e;
310694   });
310702 function inf(){
310718   fetch('/wallpaper/info').then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(j){
310798     $('st').textContent=j.has_custom?'
310869     maxUpload=Number(j.max_upload||0);
310908   }).catch(function(e){log('
310957 '+e,'err')});
310973 function preview(){
310993   if(!chosenFile){log('
311034 ','err');return}
311051   if(chosenFile.size>MAX_LOCAL_BYTES){
311090     var mb=(chosenFile.size/1024/1024).toFixed(1);
311141     log('
311162  '+mb+'MB
311186  5 MB
311221 ','err');
311231     clearChosen();return;
311261   pendingData='';showPreview('');setBusy(true);log('
311338   readAsDataUrl(chosenFile).then(convertViaApi)
311386   .then(function(res){
311409     pendingData=res.data;
311435     showPreview(res.preview?'data:image/png;base64,'+res.preview:'');
311505     log('
311568 ','ok');
311577     setBusy(false);
311602   .catch(function(e){
311624     var msg=(e&&e.message)?e.message:e;
311664     log('
311682 '+msg,'err');
311696     clearChosen();
311715   });
311723 function save(){
311740   if(!pendingData){log('
311782 ','err');return}
311799   setBusy(true);log('
311839   uploadConverted(pendingData)
311870   .then(function(){
311890     pendingData='';setBusy(false);
311925     log('
311964 ','ok');
311973     setTimeout(function(){window.location.replace('about:blank')},500);
312050   .catch(function(e){setBusy(false);log('
312100 '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e),'err')});
312141 function rst(){
312157   if(!confirm('
312202 '))return;
312213   fetch('/wallpaper',{method:'DELETE'})
312253   .then(function(r){
312274     if(r.ok){pendingData='';showPreview('');setBusy(false);log('
312359 ','ok');inf()}
312374     else{log('
312397 '+r.status,'err')}
312416   }).catch(function(e){log('
312459 '+e,'err')});
312475 inf();
312482 </script>
312492 </body></html>
312508 </body></html>
312524 <title>
312537 </title><style>:root{--bg:#F2F2F7;--cell:#FFF;--text:#000;--sub:#8E8E93;--blue:#007AFF;--red:#FF3B30;--sep:#C6C6C8}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);margin:0;padding:0 0 40px;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}.l-title{padding:18px 30px 4px;font-size:30px;font-weight:700}.g-title{padding:14px 30px 6px;font-size:13px;color:var(--sub);text-transform:uppercase}.list{background:var(--cell);margin:0 16px;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden}.item{padding:0 16px;min-height:54px;display:flex;align-items:center;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--sep);color:inherit}.item:last-child{border-bottom:none}.item:active{background:#E5E5EA}.name{flex:1;font-size:16px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.lock{width:7px;height:6px;border:1.5px solid #000;border-radius:2px;position:relative;margin-right:8px;display:inline-block}.lock:before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-5px;left:0;width:4px;height:3px;border:1.5px solid #000;border-bottom:0;border-radius:3px 3px 0 0}.sig{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:2px;margin-left:8px}.bar{width:3px;background:#000;border-radius:1px}input[type=password],input[type=text]{width:100%;border:none;outline:none;font-size:16px;background:transparent;padding:16px 0;-webkit-appearance:none}.actions{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:20px 30px 0}.btn{display:inline-block;color:var(--blue);font-size:17px;background:none;border:none;padding:6px 0;cursor:pointer}.btn-primary{font-weight:600}.hint{padding:10px 30px;color:var(--sub);font-size:13px;line-height:1.4}.msg{text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--sub);font-size:14px}.msg.ok{color:var(--blue)}.msg.err{color:var(--red)}</style></head><body>
